privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated SuiteCRM records. The target opportunity 'Enterprise License - Meridian Tech' (ID: 'opp-meridian-1234') and target bug 'UI unresponsive on mobile' (ID: 'bug-mobile-5678') are explicitly defined and inserted via the setup_task.sh script.
